name: qdrant
description: Vector database collections and semantic search via direct calls to the Qdrant REST API.

qdrant_url.title: Qdrant URL
qdrant_url.description: Base URL of the Qdrant REST API, including scheme and port. Do not include a trailing slash.

qdrant_api_key.title: API Key
qdrant_api_key.description: Optional Qdrant API key. Leave blank for unauthenticated local deployments.
